intro: Raccoons in Amityville's attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces can cause extensive property damage and health hazards. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal services throughout Amityville and surrounding Long Island communities. Our licensed wildlife technicians use proven exclusion methods to safely remove raccoons and prevent future intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Amityville homeowners and businesses for years with comprehensive raccoon removal solutions tailored to Long Island's unique wildlife challenges. Our team combines humane trapping, complete sanitization, damage repair, and guaranteed exclusion work to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Amityville's mix of historic homes near the Great South Bay, suburban neighborhoods, and wooded areas creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity, especially in properties near Amityville Village and along the Massapequa Creek corridor. From the classic homes near Ireland Place to newer developments throughout the community, raccoons frequently seek shelter in accessible attics, sheds, and underneath decks.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Amityville typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and required repairs. A single raccoon extraction averages $900-$1,500, while extensive infestations with babies, significant damage repair, and comprehensive exclusion work can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Amityville homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Amityville due to the area's proximity to water sources like the Great South Bay, mature trees, and a mix of residential and natural habitats. Raccoons frequently invade attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in search of denning sites, especially during spring breeding season and winter months. Amityville's older homes with accessible entry points are particularly vulnerable.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Amityville property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency response for Amityville raccoon removal in most cases. Initial trapping and removal typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of animals and whether babies are present. Complete exclusion work, cleanup, and repairs are usually finished within 1-2 weeks. We work efficiently to resolve your raccoon problem while ensuring humane treatment and thorough results.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on raccoon exclusion work in Amityville?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC provides written guarantees on all raccoon exclusion and prevention work in Amityville. After removing all raccoons, we seal entry points with durable materials and perform comprehensive property inspections. Our warranty covers re-entry at sealed locations, and we offer follow-up inspections to ensure your home remains raccoon-free. Ongoing maintenance plans are also available.
